languages.text: {n}Разведчики поднимают на борт вашего флагмана извлеченную вокс-запись, которую удается восстановить. В ней рядовой Рубан Хрошовач сообщает, что реквизированный Себерианом 32-ой полк {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровского штрафного легиона{/g} остался без корабля и припасов на GH-89-717 после смерти Вольного Торговца. Сообщение заканчивается фразой: "Искупление для одного".{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Разведчики поднимают на борт вашего флагмана извлеченную вокс-запись, которую удается восстановить. В ней рядовой Рубан Хорошкавич сообщает, что реквизированный Себерианом 32-ой полк {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровского штрафного легиона{/g} остался без корабля и припасов на GH-89-717 после смерти Вольного Торговца. Сообщение заканчивается фразой: "Искупление для одного".{/n}

languages.text: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Разведчики поднимают на борт вашего флагмана извлеченную вокс-запись, которую удается восстановить. В ней рядовой Рубан Хрошовач сообщает, что реквизированный Себерианом 32-ой полк {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровского штрафного легиона{/g} остался без корабля и припасов на GH-89-717 после смерти Вольного Торговца. Сообщение заканчивается фразой: "Искупление для одного".{/n}

The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

{n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

{n}On board, they manage to recover the extracted vox-recording. In it, Private Ruban Khoroshkavich reports that the 32nd Regiment of the Merov Penal Legion, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The desperate plea for help from the soldier, who clearly did not expect to be rescued himself, ends with the phrase: "Freedom for the one."{/n}

{n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

{n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

languages.text: {n}船内で、彼らは抽出されたボイスレコーダーを復元することに成功する。その中には、民間兵ルバン・クロロシュカヴィッチが、シベリアが徴用したメローペナルレギオン32連隊が、ローグトレーダーの死後、GH-89-717で船と物資を失ったことを報告している。救助を望まない兵士の切実な助けを求める言葉は、「一人に自由を」で終わる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}On board, they manage to recover the extracted vox-recording. In it, Private Ruban Khoroshkavich reports that the 32nd Regiment of the Merov Penal Legion, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The desperate plea for help from the soldier, who clearly did not expect to be rescued himself, ends with the phrase: "Freedom for the one."{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çıkarılan voks kaydı, sancak gemine teslim ediliyor ve hizmetkârların onu onarmayı başarıyor. Kayıtta Er Ruban Khroshovach; Seberian tarafından talep edilen {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Ceza İnfaz Lejyonu'nun{/g} 32. Alayı'nın, Hür Tacir'in ölümünden sonra gemisiz ve erzaksız hâlde GH-89-717'ye bırakıldığını bildiriyor. Mesaj, şu ifadeyle sona eriyor: "Sona kalana kefaret."{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çıkarılan voks kaydı, sancak gemine teslim ediliyor ve hizmetkârların onu onarmayı başarıyor. Kayıtta Er Ruban Khroshovach; Seberian tarafından talep edilen {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Ceza İnfaz Lejyonu'nun{/g} 32. Alayı'nın, Hür Tacir'in ölümünden sonra gemisiz ve erzaksız hâlde GH-89-717'ye bırakıldığını bildiriyor. Mesaj, şu ifadeyle sona eriyor: "Sona kalana kefaret."{/n}

languages.text: {n}这段提取出来的音阵录音被传送到你的旗舰上，你的仆从设法修复了它。在录音中，列兵鲁班·霍罗什维奇报告说，由塞贝里安征调的第32{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫判罪军团{/g}，在行商浪人死后，被遗弃在GH-89-717，失去了舰船与补给。这条消息最终以“一人之赎”作结。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这段提取出来的音阵录音被传送到你的旗舰上，你的仆从设法修复了它。在录音中，列兵鲁班·霍罗什维奇报告说，由塞贝里安征调的第32{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫判罪军团{/g}，在行商浪人死后，被遗弃在GH-89-717，失去了舰船与补给。这条消息最终以“一人之赎”作结。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die extrahierte Vox-Aufzeichnung wird auf dein Flaggschiff gebracht und von deinen Dienern wiederhergestellt. Sie enthält einen Bericht des einfachen Soldaten Ruban Khroshovach, wonach das von Seberian requirierte 32. Regiment der {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov-Straflegion{/g} nach dem Tod des Freihändlers ohne Schiff und Vorräte auf GH-89-717 zurückgelassen wurde. Die Nachricht endet mit folgender Parole: "Sühne für den Einzelnen."{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die extrahierte Vox-Aufzeichnung wird auf dein Flaggschiff gebracht und von deinen Dienern wiederhergestellt. Sie enthält einen Bericht des einfachen Soldaten Ruban Khroshovach, wonach das von Seberian requirierte 32. Regiment der {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov-Straflegion{/g} nach dem Tod des Freihändlers ohne Schiff und Vorräte auf GH-89-717 zurückgelassen wurde. Die Nachricht endet mit folgender Parole: "Sühne für den Einzelnen."{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'enregistrement-vox extrait arrive à bord de votre vaisseau amiral, où vos serviteurs parviennent à le restaurer. Dans ce message, le soldat Ruban Khroshovach rapporte que le 32e régiment de la {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Légion Pénale de Merov{/g}, réquisitionnée par Seberian, s'est retrouvé sans vaisseau et sans ressources sur GH-89-717 après la mort du libre-marchand. Le message se termine par la phrase : « Expiation pour un seul. »{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'enregistrement-vox extrait arrive à bord de votre vaisseau amiral, où vos serviteurs parviennent à le restaurer. Dans ce message, le soldat Ruban Khroshovach rapporte que le 32e régiment de la {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Légion Pénale de Merov{/g}, réquisitionnée par Seberian, s'est retrouvé sans vaisseau et sans ressources sur GH-89-717 après la mort du libre-marchand. Le message se termine par la phrase : « Expiation pour un seul. »{/n}

languages.text: {n}La grabación de voco extraída pronto llega a tu nave insignia, donde tus sirvientes la restauran. En ella, el soldado Ruban Khroshovach informa de que el 32.º regimiento de la {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}legión penal de Merov{/g}, requisado por Seberian, quedó sin nave y sin suministros en GH-89-717 tras la muerte del Comerciante Independiente. El mensaje termina con la frase «Expiación para el último».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The extracted vox-recording is delivered aboard your flagship, where your servants manage to restore it. In it, Private Ruban Khroshovach reports that the 32nd Regiment of the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Penal Legion{/g}, requisitioned by Seberian, was left without a ship and supplies on GH-89-717 after the Rogue Trader's death. The message ends with the phrase: "Atonement for the one."{/n}
